title: Two earbuds screen/second screen, left zoom in/out
scenario: On the second screen with two earbuds, clicking the left circle button toggles zoom and displays new text.
steps: Navigate to the second screen with two earbuds displayed.
Observe the screen zoom in and new text appear.
Click the same circle button again.
Observe the screen zoom out to the original view.
expected: Clicking the left circle button zooms in and shows new text; clicking again zooms out to the original screen.
